name: detector --dry-run with --fix leaves files unchanged
command: cp src/a.ts /tmp/no-any-before.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --fix --dry-run --paths "src/**/*.ts"; cmp -s src/a.ts /tmp/no-any-before.ts && echo ok 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL: file modified during --dry-run" 1>&2; exit 1; }
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts
